title: ayenia subsessilis
intro: Ayenia subsessilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as a type of weed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ayenia subsessilis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ayenia subsessilis typically involve the leaves and stems being dried and used in tea infusions or as a topical application.
